narrative:
Richland County has 77,416 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.2% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -8.2% D−R vs -19.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
